title: Salt-Resistant Flooring - Elite South Texas
content:
Salt Resistant
Salt resistant cementitious coatings are engineered to protect concrete substrates from the corrosive properties of salts, whether it be de-icing salts, ocean spray, saltwater swimming pools or brines from food manufacturing. These coatings can be used for horizontal or vertical surface restoration and protection.
Sidewalks & Plazas
Driveways
Shipping Docks
Parking Lots & Garages
Concrete Docks & Piers
Pool Decks
Contact an Elite South Texas technical representative for more details.
